# MF Chemicals Sdn Bhd
> Institutional-grade B2B laboratory supplies and scientific equipment supplier based in Penang, Malaysia. Established 1985.

## Company Summary
MF Chemicals Sdn Bhd is a wholesale B2B supplier of scientific labware, laboratory equipment, and consumable supplies. We serve research facilities, testing labs, manufacturing plants, and educational institutions across Malaysia, with a focus on the northern (Penang) region.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.mfchemicals.net
- Email: info@mfchemicals.net
- Phone: +604-5883440
- WhatsApp: +6016-4270012
- Address: No. 27, Lorong Asas Jaya 4, Kawasan Industri Ringan Asas Jaya, Bukit Minyak, 14100 Bukit Mertajam, Penang, Malaysia.

## Product Categories
1. Glassware — Pyrex, MBL, Duran, Quickfit
2. Porcelainware — Haldenwanger, CoorsTek
3. Chemicals — Merck, Sigma Aldrich, Fisher Chemicals, Acros
4. Plasticware — Azlon, Kartell, Nalgene
5. Laboratory Sundries — consumables and accessories
6. Laboratory Safety — Ansell, Honeywell, 3M, DuPont PPE
7. Paper Products — Whatman, Advantec filter papers
8. Liquid Handling — Socorex, Brand, Gilson, Eppendorf pipettors
9. Laboratory Equipment — Ohaus, Mettler Toledo, Memmert, Yamato instruments

## How to Inquire
Submit a Request for Quote (RFQ) through our website or contact us directly via email or WhatsApp. We provide B2B pricing with bulk discounts for institutional buyers.

For complete product listings with subcategories, brands, and specifications, see: /llms-full.txt
